name: The Truth
description: Hello my students. Apologies for not posting anything lately, I have been trying to stop myself from seeing anything NSFW related and heal my mental health, I don't really want to go any deeper into it really since it links to my private life. I probably will be posting a bot soon (Maybe later today but I don't know). I also must thank you all for 3000 followers! That has definately brightened my day up so thank you all for being patient with my terrible schedule. I hope you all have been doing well and sorry for this being a little on the serious side of things. I hope to see all soon
creator: SomeB10ke
